# PlantPal - Product Requirements Document

## Overview

PlantPal is a mobile application that helps users care for their houseplants by providing personalized care schedules and plant identification.

## Functional Requirements

### FR-1: Plant Identification

Users can photograph a plant and receive identification results with care instructions.

### FR-2: Care Scheduling

The app sends push notifications for watering, fertilizing, and repotting based on plant type and environment.

## Non-Functional Requirements

### NFR-1: Performance

Plant identification must return results within 3 seconds on a standard mobile connection.

### NFR-2: Offline Support

Core care schedule functionality must work offline with data syncing when connectivity is restored.
